home.sectionSubtitle: Objective: deliver reliable, maintainable web systems. Stack focus: Nuxt, Vue, TypeScript.
home.headline: Web Developer
home.lead: Specialized in Nuxt and scalable state management. Built for performance, clarity, and long-term maintenance.
